verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Don't grow weary in doing well Don't surrender in the fight Keep on stormin' the gates of hell Keep on doin' what you know is right

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For there will be seasons of testing And there may be weeping for a night But soon we'll be reaping the blessing If we keep pressing on toward the prize

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Keep on praying in the Spirit Keep on walking in the light Don't be fearful or discouraged Keep on doin' what you know is right

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For there will be seasons of testing And there may be weeping for a night But soon we'll be reaping the blessing If we keep pressing on toward the prize

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Don't grow weary in doing well Don't surrender in the fight Keep on stormin' the gates of hell Keep on doin' what you know is right

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Keep on praying in the Spirit Keep on walking in the light Don't be fearful or discouraged Keep on doin' what you know is right

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Forgetting what lies behind Setting our hearts on the prize Always keeping our eyes on our Lord Jesus We're running the race to win All the way to the end Laying down every sin That would seek to hinder us

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And we'll be faithful to our calling For You are able to keep us from falling For in Your promise We will trust You'll be faithful to finish the work You began in us

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Forgetting what lies behind Setting our hearts on the prize Always keeping our eyes on our Lord Jesus We're running the race to win All the way to the end Laying down every sin That would seek to hinder us

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And we'll be faithful to our calling For You are able to keep us from falling For in Your promise We will trust You'll be faithful to finish the work You began in us
